title: Thoughts on 12/18/22 — Stagnation, Coding-Behind, Rat-Race Doubt
html:
TL;DR

  • Late-Dec 2022 entry written after smoking weed for the first time in a long time with Riley — surfaces a layered doubt: "I am the same person... it's getting a lot harder than it used to be... I am not that person anymore."
  • Coding-as-imposter image lands clearly: "coding feels like I'm playing a game that everyone is already really good at, and I am playing from way far behind. Like playing Mario Kart when people have been grinding Mario Kart." — Yahir's most evocative early articulation of the technical-catch-up anxiety that shapes the next 4 years.
  • The rat race tension gets named: "continue chasing and striving for things, or find contentment in the thing in front of you" — and Yahir explicitly flags that the contentment frame "sounds like total bullshit and like settling, but it always sounds peaceful."
  • Closes with a dad wisdom-flavored aphorism: "do a good present and you don't have to worry about the future." Reads as inherited and held simultaneously — Yahir is using a paternal frame to settle his own doubt.
  • The Riley contrast is interesting: Riley framed himself as a "renaissance man from being down in the gutter" and Yahir notes he "didn't have that same level of rise" — comparison-to-the-comeback-arc as a destabilizing input.

Core content

This entry is one of the cleanest second person interrogation specimens — "You are the same person... You are not that person anymore. Can't be him because him doesn't exist." The grammar shifts mid-sentence between "I" and "You"; the doubt is being addressed to a self that is being talked-to, not just from.

The Mario Kart metaphor for coding is worth its own line in the corpus catalog. By 2026 Yahir is shipping production SwiftUI and Supabase code for Brotein and Rankett, but in Dec 2022 he's writing this. The arc from Mario Kart imposter → Rankett tech-stack documentation is one of the 4-year compression stories worth a synthesis page later.

The rat-race / contentment dialectic is also pre-Austin and pre-Rankett. By 2025–2026 the contentment side largely loses — Yahir explicitly chooses grinding-while-broke in 2025 09 23 how im scraping by. But this Dec 2022 entry is the moment the frame is held even-handed: contentment-as-settling vs grinding-as-rat-race, both real, neither chosen yet.

Stub notes

  • mario kart imposter syndrome — could be promoted as a concept if echoed; for now queue to potential entities.
  • riley — queued to potential entities (recurring friend, no entity page yet despite multiple mentions; promote on next surface)

Connections

  • osu / corvallis or — location
  • founder loneliness 2022 2026 — second-person interrogation pattern
  • dad wisdom — closing aphorism source-frame
  • voluntary adversity as philosophy — pre-form of the grind-vs-comfort axis
  • — form
  • recurring theme you havent named — writing-as-release thread
